payload.answer: The message is a follow-up and content request: the sender says they recently joined Point72 and asks to receive an AI infrastructure article.

entity_resolution.reason: The source identifies a sender but does not provide a durable personal identity suitable for storage; preserve ambiguity and avoid exposing raw address data.

memory_cards.statement: A contact reported starting at Point72 last month.
The sender asked for an article about AI infrastructure.

details: Captured a durable employer change with medium confidence.
Captured a content request with high confidence.
Avoided storing raw email address or verbatim source text.

repair_options: If a person identity is later confirmed, merge this anonymous contact reference into the canonical contact record.
If the article is sent, log the delivery separately from the memory of the request.
